title: Add TrickleSafeLivenessPolicy trait and default impl in routing.rs
description: Define a policy that decides liveness based on Trickle state to avoid premature eviction that would violate suppression rules. Include is_alive method taking neighbor last_seen, now, timeout.
close_reason: Added TrickleSafeLivenessPolicy trait with default impl for TrickleAwareNeighborLiveness, full docs from spec/RFC comments, identified all call sites for future refactor (but no sub-beads or further changes per instructions). Code inserted in lichen-node/src/routing.rs.
